message:
fix(fwc): use unique temp file names for atomic write-then-rename

Replace static .tmp suffix with UUID-based temp paths (e.g.
.tmp.a1b2c3d4) in credential, config, lock, and preference file
persistence to prevent clobbering when multiple agents write
concurrently. Extract temp_path_for() helper in each module.
Add uniqueness tests for all three backends.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
